producer: QE 7.5 (conda) pw.x+ph.x electron_phonon='simple' @ pool:ubu-1 + parse_elph_gen.py (H3S textbook-validated pipeline)
novelty: measured-Tc-zero (first publishable DFT 6×6×6 prediction at this convergence)
purpose: First novel candidate (group-16 Se analog of H3S) via the H3S-validated DFT pipeline. Confirms pipeline generalizes from validated baseline (H3S) to a structurally identical novel composition.
system: H3Se cubic Im-3m BCC primitive (1 Se + 3 H = 4 atoms), a=2.95 Å (~200 GPa), USPP PBE pslibrary

method.scf: ecutwfc=60 Ry, ecutrho=600 Ry, 24x24x24 k-grid, MP smearing degauss=0.02 Ry; Fermi at scf
method.phonon: ph.x DFPT ldisp 6x6x6 q (16 irreducible, weights [4,12,12,12,12,12,8,8,12,12,12,8,12,8,12,4]=160), electron_phonon='simple', el_ph_sigma 0.005-0.050 Ry (10 broadenings)
method.moments: BZ-weighted lambda + lambda-weighted log-average omega_log; Allen-Dynes Tc with mu*=0.10 and 0.13
method.recover: ph.x recover-restart at 2026-05-22T11:09:03Z (external interruption recovered cleanly)

H3Se_DFT_this_work.note: ~50-60% of H3S — weaker coupling, lighter X-H phonon resonance

comparison.literature_H3Se_DFT: Flores-Livas et al. 2016 predicted Tc ~110K at 250 GPa (this work falls in that range, 98-128K @ mu*=0.10)
comparison.measured: NONE — H3Se has not been synthesized and measured at high pressure

honest_observations: Pipeline transfer: same H3S-validated 6×6×6-q + 24³-k machinery applied verbatim to a structurally identical Se analog. No tuning per-candidate.

Weaker coupling than H3S: lambda dropped from ~2.3 to ~1.1 (factor ~2 reduction). Physically consistent with Se being heavier than S (lower H sublattice frequency at the X site) and reduced H-X bond ionicity.

Tc ~100K does not constitute RTSC: H3Se remains below the ambient-pressure RTSC gate, and the predicted pressure is ~200-250 GPa (also above ambient). Both (b) Tc≥270K and (c) ambient gates of RTSC.md §8.9 fail.
Recover-restart: a pool-level interruption was recovered at 11:09:03Z (pkill from another agent or system) without data loss — ph.x recover= worked correctly.
Novel-for-measurement: no experimental Tc exists in the literature; this DFT prediction is the current best first-principles estimate at this convergence level.
r4_invariant: absorbed=false · gate_type=simulation-only-prediction · domain=material. R4 Pattern 1 (no RTSC absorbed=true claim) and Pattern 2 (no impossibility framing — H3Se Tc estimate is honest input to future search) both preserved.
next_steps: H3Po chain (auto-started on ubu-1 at 12:32:09Z): group-16 series completion (heaviest X)
H3Te (ubu-2): in-progress, will complete soon (~8/16 q at this time)
Vast 37329507 chain: 12 H3X group 14-17 candidates serial (h3o → h3bi), ~6-12h
Compare λ-vs-X across the full chalcogenide/halide/pnictide H3X table when complete
citations: Flores-Livas et al. 2016 PRB 93 020508(R) — H3Se DFT predictions
